title: 10X Magnification LED Makeup Mirror with Dimmable Lights, Hollywood Vanity Mirror USB Powered, 3 Light Modes for Bedroom Dressing Table (pure white)
features: 💕[Built-in 4000mAh rechargeable Lithium battery]: WITFAMILY Large Lighted Vanity Makeup built-in 4000mAh rechargeable Lithium battery, continuously works for up to 12 hours after fully charged, no need to charge frequently any more, convenient for you to take for travelling. The vanity mirror can be charged through USB by powerbank, PC, etc. Soft pads at the bottom make the mirror stands stably by itself on countertop.

💕[Upgraded LED Lights] Upgraded tabletop vanity mirror ,can light the most dark and poorly lit areas. Dimmable natural light perfect for office, home, dim-lit room and most places.The light is natural and soft, bright but not dazzling, Easily switch the color temp to see your makeup look in various lighting situations.like daytime, evening, home, dorm and office environments.

💕[1X/10X Magnifying Makeup Mirror] Superior detachable 10X magnification mirror helps you to see every detail clearly and apply delicate makeup such as mascara, eyeliner, eyebrow and lipstick. 1 suction cups can mounted mirror on glass or big mirror.

💕[360 Degree Rotating] The led makeup mirror stands on your countertop can be rotated Up and down 90 degree and Surround 360 degree rotation, Easy to find the perfect viewing angle without effort. The detachable bracket design makes it a portable lighted makeup mirror,very suitable for travel.

💕【Einfache Installation&Qualität】WITFAMILY Hollywood Spiegel mit Beleuchtung wird mit einem Handbuch geliefert. Die Artikel k ö nnen in 5-6 Minuten zusammengebaut werden. Wenn Sie einen kaputten Spiegel erhalten, senden Sie uns bitte E-Mail und wir werden Ihnen innerhalb von 24 Stunden eine zufriedenstellende Antwort geben.
